name: Rakott Krumpli, Hungarian Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and slice them thinly.
2. Boil the peeled potatoes in their skins until tender.
3. Boil the eggs separately.
4. In a Pyrex baking dish, layer the ingredients: start with sliced potatoes at the bottom, sprinkle grated butter on top, add salt, then sliced boiled eggs, more salt, sour cream, and sliced sausage (or franks). Repeat this layering once more.
5. Finish with a final layer of potato slices.
6. Sprinkle grated Swiss cheese over the layers.
7. Lay the bacon slices diagonally across the cheese in an intersecting pattern.
8. Bake the dish in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 45-60 minutes, or until the bacon is crisp and the cheese is melted.
